en: Hoppers made me feel all of the emotions on the spectrum.
ko: Hoppers는 온갖 감정을 느끼게 해줬어. 정말 정말 행복하고, 향수를 느끼고, 그냥

en: Really, really happy. Nostalgic, and just made me feel warm on the inside.
ko: Hoppers는 온갖 감정을 느끼게 해줬어. 정말 정말 행복하고, 향수를 느끼고, 그냥

en: Very sentimental. Mabel, it was just one person, and it just kind of made me feel like maybe I could do anything.
